creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update lang/nbc to 1.0.1.b34.

This version contains bugfixes, new opcodes for the enhanced firmware, (sensor) API additions, and compiler speed-ups.

The latest version, 1.0.1.b35, currently fails to build.

Patch is tested with portlint and `port test'.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
